title.en: Ye Tian came out of here, and then went directl...

content.en:
For Ye Tian, it was not difficult to break through to become an ancient demon-level powerhouse, but the Huoxi space-time battlefield was not the best place to break through.

After all, the suppression of the ancient demon-level powerhouses here, it will naturally affect the emperor-level powerhouses to impact the ancient demon-level powerhouses.

Therefore, if Ye Tian wants to break through, he has to return to the abyss of Aromu.

......

The gate of time and space between the abyss of Aromu and the battlefield of Huoxi.

Ye Tian came out of here, and then went directly to the Dragon Disciple Tribe.

After his continuous shuttle, it didn't take long to arrive at the dragon tribe.

However, instead of staying in the Dragonfall Tribe, he returned to the Eagle Tribe.

Of course, he didn't mention it to anyone about his return.

Actually, he doesn't need to come back, because he still has a copy body left here, but he needs to make a "610" like coming back, otherwise he will break through to the ancient demon level, and if others investigate, there will be some flaws.

Ye Tian had broken through to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable in his own era, and in this era, he was naturally very experienced in breaking through to the Gu Demon level.

In the Eagle Department, Ye Tian has his own dojo, and he is in retreat here to attack the ancient demon level.

With a single thought, Ye Tian's body turned into countless particles, gradually completing the ultimate particle, and then the ultimate particle began to transform, frantically absorbing the ultimate particle energy from the outside world, so that the success rate of his breakthrough would skyrocket.

In this era, the success rate of the emperor level breaking through the ancient demon level is still not low, at least a hundred times easier than his era.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's body is still transforming, his ultimate will is also transforming, and the aura on his body is becoming more and more terrifying.

And this breakthrough naturally attracted the attention of many emperors in the Eagle Department.

He Lao and Crane Shadow looked at Ye Tian's retreat, the surging ultimate particle fluctuations, countless energies poured into that side, the movement was too big, not only the Eagle Territory was affected, but also many surrounding tribes were affected.

"It's heaven that I'm about to break through to the ancient demon level!"

He Lao muttered.

Patriarch Crane Ying said worriedly: "It is said that the emperor-level impact on the ancient demon level is a bit dangerous, once the breakthrough fails, it will fall, the sky should be able to break through successfully, right?"

"It will definitely succeed, how powerful the heavens are, none of the dragon disciple tribes and the emperor level of the Golden God Department are stronger than the heavens, he will definitely be able to break through to the ancient demon level one hundred percent. "

"Once the Heavenly Breakthrough reaches the Ancient Demon level, our Eagle Department will also have an Ancient Demon level powerhouse, which can be regarded as a top tribe!"

Thinking of this, the current emperors of the Eagle Department were very excited.

Thinking that at the beginning, the Eagle Department was an old emperor, and it was also an ordinary emperor, and now there are not only several emperors, but even an ancient demon-level powerhouse is about to have it, and they are naturally extremely excited.

......

Tribe of Dragons.

Long Ying also knew about the Eagle Department, and naturally knew that Ye Tian was impacting the ancient demon level.

"I thought that it would take a long time for Tianhui to break through to the ancient demon level, but I didn't expect to break through so quickly. Dragon Shadow was a little surprised.

Moreover, the information transmitted back from the dragon army, Tian suppressed other emperor list powerhouses in the Aromu Fortress, ranking second on the emperor list.

You must know that the top ten on the emperor list are almost all strong people cultivated by Luo Mu's main department, but they were suppressed by Ye Tian.

When he first learned about it, he didn't believe it, but after many confirmations, he had to believe it.

"It's strange, the emperor is second on the list, and the salary is extremely high, why do you want to break through so quickly, isn't it good to stay for a long time?"

Dragon Shadow was puzzled.

The other side.

The gaze of the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse Proz also crossed the void and looked at the location of the Eagle Department.

"This little guy is attacking the Ancient Demon level, and with his potential, I'm afraid it won't be long before he can break through to a top Ancient Demon level powerhouse, or even rival me!" Pleoz muttered.

Ye Tian and he belong to the same camp, if Ye Tian breaks through to the realm of a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse in the future, at least the two sides will have a response.

As for whether Ye Tian could break through to the ultimate ancient demon, he didn't hold out hope, it was not a matter of talent and qualification, but a matter of chance.

Ye Tian is not the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse of the Luo Mother's main department after all, and without the help of the Luo Mother's main department, the chance of breaking through to become the ultimate Gu Demon is almost zero!

Time passes slowly.

It's been another time.

Finally, Ye Tian's breakthrough was completed and he achieved the ancient demon level realm.

......

"What a strong ancient demon-level body!"

Ye Tian felt the change in his body, and now his physical body was much stronger than his real body.......

In his time, after his human body broke through to the ultimate supreme, the strength of his physical body was only about one-sixth of what it is now.

This is just the physical body gap, if you count the Ultimate Rule Realm, the Mystic Technique of Ten Thousand Forms, the Secret Technique of the Golden Body of Aluo, the Secret Technique of the Arm of the Arrow, and the Three Peak Ultimate Arcanes, then the difference in strength is even greater.

With his current strength, he can kill his human true body in seconds!

However, his current body is just a trace of the past time and space, and once this time and space is shattered, everything will come to naught.

But once he returns to the real time and space, he can completely transform his body, thus making his strength skyrocket many times.

"With my current strength, Doomsday Supreme Zun shouldn't be my opponent!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

And after breaking through to the Ancient Demon Level, he can now create the third form of the Myriad Formation Secret Method, the Arrow Golden Body Form Secret Method, and the Arrow Arm Formation Secret Method, which is estimated to take a long time.

Of course, he is not in a hurry, and there are many aspects that he can also improve, such as the physical body, he has obtained countless resources from the space-time ancient demon realm, which can be used on his body, helping him improve his cultivation and physical body, and strive to reach the limit of the ordinary ancient demon-level realm as soon as possible, so as to break through to the top ancient demon-level powerhouse!

Anyway, he had already comprehended the Ultimate Rule Realm, and there was no bottleneck for the Ancient Demon Body to complete the second transformation and become a top Ancient Demon-level powerhouse.

After 5.0, he went into retreat for a few more years before visiting Pleoz.

......

Tribe of Dragons.

Ye Tian met Proz here.

"Meet Lord Plotz!"

Pleoz looked at Ye Tian and said with satisfaction: "Very good, even I can't see through you now, I'm afraid your life pattern is comparable to me at the peak ancient demon level!"

"Master Plotz is false, I'm still far away!"

Ye Tian said modestly.

After that, Ye Tian chatted with Plotz for a long time before leaving.

Not long after, Ye Tian returned to the Arrow Mother Fortress, even if he broke through to become an ancient demon-level powerhouse, he could still enter there instead of the Dragon Disciple Tribe.

And if he enters here, he can let a dragon disciple tribe ancient demon-level powerhouse go back.
